task_description: Write an RFP response for a healthcare network seeking an AI-powered clinical decision support system.

input_data.responding_company: MedAI Solutions (health-tech company specializing in clinical AI, 150 employees, FDA-cleared products)

rfp_requirements.scope: Deploy an AI-powered clinical decision support system across all 12 hospitals that assists physicians with diagnosis suggestions, drug interaction alerts, treatment protocol recommendations, and early deterioration detection from patient vitals.
key_requirements: FDA 510(k) clearance for clinical decision support modules
Sub-2-second response time for real-time alerts
Support for HL7 FHIR data standards
